sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50562" key="i)copoie/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰξοποιέω</orth>, <sense id="n50562.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make viscous</tr_> <abbr TEIform="abbr">like</abbr> birdlime, of a plaster, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:2:43" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.43</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
